title: GET PREP - 211info
text: CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION GET PREP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a locator tool to find healthcare providers who prescribe PrEP, a medication that helps prevent HIV infection. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to find a PrEP provider FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: AIDS/HIV Prevention Counseling Physician Referrals * AIDS/HIV Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - NATURAL DISASTERS AND SEVERE WEATHER EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MILESTONES HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - COVID-19 NO COST TESTING INFORMATION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - FLU AND COVID-19 VACCINE FINDER PUBLIC HEALTH - CDC NATIONAL PREVENTION INFORMATION NETWORK SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TRAVELERS' HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION
